# task-attachments

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Renders the task's attachments (images, files) in the detail pane.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `TaskDetailSlots.Section` "attachments" → `TaskAttachments`
  - Uses: `infra/endpoints.useEndpoint`, `primitives/collapsible.Collapsible`, `primitives/collapsible.CollapsibleContent`, `primitives/css/row.Row`, `primitives/css/row.SectionHeaderRow`, `primitives/css/spacing.Stack`, `primitives/css/text.Text`, `tasks/task-detail.TaskDetailSlots`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
